title: MergeEntitiesResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag merge-entities --json` on stdout as a single JSON line.

sources.description: Names of the source entities that were merged into the target.

target.description: Name of the surviving target entity after the merge.

namespace.description: Namespace in which the merge was performed.

relationships_moved.description: Number of graph relationships re-pointed to the target entity.

entities_removed.description: Number of source entities permanently removed after the merge.
